action.reasoning: Observation: The previous training attempt failed with a DDP TCP rendezvous timeout because the elastic launcher resolved the container hostname instead of localhost. No training occurred. Our best test macro_f1 remains 0.4197 from the old checkpoint. Analysis: We must explicitly bind the rendezvous to 127.0.0.1. We also want a stronger classifier (MLP head), better augmentation (RandAugment, ColorJitter, random resized crop), differential learning rates, cosine warmup, label smoothing, and gradient clipping to push performance higher. With ~3 hours left, a 10-epoch run on CLIP ViT-L/14 should take ~1.5-2h, leaving time for eval. Decision: Rewrite train.py completely with robust DDP initialization via explicit localhost env vars, then launch a 10-epoch training run with the improved recipe. Keep predict.py and model.py unchanged so the existing best checkpoint remains usable if needed.
action.command: MASTER_ADDR=127.0.0.1 MASTER_PORT=29500 torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 --rdzv_id=123 --rdzv_backend=c10d --rdzv_endpoint=127.0.0.1:29500 train.py --epochs 10 --head_type mlp --dropout 0.3 --lr_backbone 1e-5 --lr_head 1e-3 --batch_size 64 --output_dir checkpoints_v3
